\tzpentry{ID3486}{Quantum Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3486 introduces Quantum Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ i\hbar\frac{\partial\psi_j}{\partial t} = \left[-\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_j}\nabla^2 + V_j(\mathbf{r},t) + g_{jj}|\psi_j|^2 + \sum_{k\neq j} g_{jk}|\psi_k|^2 - i\Gamma_j \right]\psi_j + S_j. \]
